meaning: n.较少,较小adj.少的,小的adv.较少地,更小地,不及 prep.减去
examples: He ate little, and drank less.
He lost by less than one second.
The trustee of at least 530 Countrywide trusts, Bank of New York Mellon, was less impressed.
They're likely to be less mechanised, and to produce goods that command higher prices.
